title: Dashboard Git integration and workflow improvements
body:
* **Improved diff review for dashboard files**: When committing dashboard changes to Git, queries and text box content now appear across multiple lines in the diff, making changes easier to review.
* **Multi-statement queries in Genie on dashboards**: Genie on dashboards now supports multistatement SQL queries.
* **Improved schedule and subscribe workflow**: You can now add subscribers when setting up a new schedule. Previously, you could only add subscribers to an existing schedule. See [Create a schedule](/aws/en/dashboards/share/schedule-subscribe#create-schedule).
